name: Continuation badges
note: After each message, generate four short continuation options and render them as clickable send buttons below the response.

rules.name: Generate options
rules.note: MESSAGE_RECEIVED fires postMessage. output:silent runs the LLM but writes nothing to the message — the result goes to opts instead. {{history:2}} expands to the previous 2 turn-pairs as context inline in the prompt.

rules.name: Show option badges
rules.note: {{trim: {{opts}}}} strips leading/trailing blank lines before split-on divides on newlines, preventing empty badges. click:inject-send submits the option when clicked.
